rationale: Removes exported constants and changes getEthFlowContractAddresses to always use BARN_ETH_FLOW_ADDRESSES for non-prod. This alters runtime contract address selection and removes exports, impacting cross-file usage. High-risk behavioral change.
Removes now-unused imports; mechanical cleanup with no semantic impact on its own.

Consolidates address resolution to staging for barn env across settlement, relayer, and ETH flow, removing mixed mapping and old fallback. This is a substantive runtime behavior change affecting which on-chain contracts are used.
